project_structure.purpose: Agentic development ecosystem template with saga-based orchestration

key_directories.orchestrator/: Saga orchestration engine and Devin CLI wrapper
key_directories.steps/: Individual step definitions with prompts and verification scripts

relevant_adrs.relevance: Critical - Defines the saga orchestration architecture that this requirement extends
key_points: Devin CLI runs in non-interactive mode (-p flag) for deterministic execution
StepDefinition class loads step.json with prompt, model, budget, timeout, verify fields
Saga executor calls DevinWrapper for each step execution
Graph-based routing with pass/fail branching based on exit codes

devin_wrapper_command_building.limitation: Hardcoded global config path; no support for step-specific configs
devin_wrapper_command_building.needed_change: Use step-specific config if available, fall back to global config

saga_executor_step_execution.current_behavior: Lines 220-227: Loads step definition and creates DevinWrapper instance
saga_executor_step_execution.interaction: Passes inputs to wrapper but no config path handling
saga_executor_step_execution.needed_change: May need to pass config path to wrapper or let wrapper load from step definition

saga_models.decision_needed: Should NodeDefinition include agent_config field, or should it be in step.json only?

existing_patterns.pattern: Path resolution relative to step directory
existing_patterns.example: StepDefinition.get_prompt_content() resolves prompt paths relative to step_def_dir
existing_patterns.applicability: Should use same pattern for agent_config path resolution

existing_patterns.example: verify field is optional; if not specified, verification is skipped
existing_patterns.applicability: agent_config should follow same optional pattern with global fallback

existing_patterns.example: Verification script path is validated before execution
saga_validator.py checks all references exist before execution
existing_patterns.applicability: Saga validation should check agent_config files if specified

design_precedents.evidence: Step definitions, saga definitions, and agent config all use JSON
design_precedents.implication: agent_config field should be a simple string (file path), not inline config

design_precedents.evidence: Prompts and verification scripts resolved relative to step directory
design_precedents.implication: agent_config paths should resolve relative to step directory by default
agent_config must be optional; existing steps must work without it

design_precedents.evidence: Saga validator checks references before execution
design_precedents.implication: Agent config validation should happen at saga validation time, not execution time

changes: Add get_agent_config_path() method to resolve config path
Update build_devin_command() to use step-specific config if available
Update saga validation to check agent_config file existence
No changes needed to _execute_step() if config is loaded by StepDefinition
Add validation for agent_config file existence in _validate_step_definition()

files_to_create.purpose: Example step-specific agent configurations (optional, for documentation)

schema_updates.change: Add optional agent_config field (string, file path)

low_risk_items: Adding optional field to StepDefinition - backward compatible
Fallback to global config - simple conditional logic
medium_risk_items: Saga validation changes - must not break existing sagas
Path resolution edge cases - relative vs absolute, traversal
Error messages - must be clear when config is missing
high_risk_items: Devin CLI flag support - must verify --agent-config works in non-interactive mode
Backward compatibility - all existing steps must continue to work

unit_tests_needed: DevinWrapper command building with step-specific config
integration_tests_needed: Saga validation with missing config files

options: Replace: Step-specific config completely replaces global config
Merge: Combine step-specific and global configs (union of permissions)
open_design_decisions.recommendation: Replace - simpler, more predictable, better for least-privilege
open_design_decisions.impact: Affects implementation complexity and security model

options: Wrapper validates: Check config structure in StepDefinition or DevinWrapper
Delegate to Devin: Pass config to CLI, let it validate
open_design_decisions.recommendation: Wrapper validates - better error messages, fail fast
open_design_decisions.impact: Affects error handling and user experience

options: Add agent_config to NodeDefinition in saga_models.py
open_design_decisions.recommendation: Keep in step.json only - simpler, less coupling
open_design_decisions.impact: Affects saga definition schema and executor logic

internal_dependencies: Saga validator (must check config file existence)
external_dependencies: Devin CLI - must support --agent-config flag in non-interactive mode
Python pathlib - for path resolution (already in use)
knowledge_dependencies: Devin CLI permission model and --agent-config behavior

complexity_breakdown.StepDefinition changes: Low - simple field addition and path resolution
complexity_breakdown.DevinWrapper changes: Low - conditional logic for config selection
complexity_breakdown.Path resolution: Medium - handle relative, absolute, and edge cases
complexity_breakdown.Testing: Medium - multiple scenarios and edge cases

summary.target_state: Each step can specify its own agent-config.json; fallback to global if not specified
key_changes: Add optional agent_config field to StepDefinition
Implement path resolution for agent_config (relative to step directory)
Update DevinWrapper to use step-specific config if available
Add validation in saga validator to check config file existence
summary.backward_compatibility: Fully maintained - existing steps without agent_config will use global config
summary.security_benefit: Principle of least privilege - each step only gets permissions it needs
